name: Family Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Condensed tomato or cream of
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the meat. Place the roast in a slow cooker, cutting it in half if needed to fit. Add celery and onion.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together the soup, vinegar, bouillon granules, sage, and pepper. Pour into the slow cooker.
3. Cover and cook on high for 4 1/2 to 5 hours or on low for 9 to 10 hours until meat is very tender.
4. In a small bowl, stir together water and flour until smooth. Stir into boiling liquid around the roast. Cover and continue cooking on high for 20 to 30 minutes until thickened.
5. Transfer meat to a warm platter. Serve gravy separately. Serve with mashed potatoes or rice or noodles.
